channel.title: YCP 農業サステナ Podcast
channel.description: 農業サステナビリティ・カーボンクレジット関連のNotebookLM Audio Overview
channel.itunes:author: YCP Holdings
channel.itunes:summary: 農業サステナビリティ・カーボンクレジット関連のNotebookLM Audio Overview

item.title: 2030年森林破壊ゼロへの絶対期限
item.description:
2030年森林破壊ゼロへの絶対期限
情報源: Chestnut Carbon Issues First U.S. IFM Carbon Credits with Verras Removals Tag / Climate Action - European Commission / Corporate climate target-setting up 40% in 2025 - SBTi / Farmers are key to fighting climate change - WEF / Finite Carbon Announces Landmark Issuance - ACR IFM v2.1 / Land Sector and Removals Standard - GHG Protocol / SBTi FLAG Guidance Updated / VM0042 Improved Agricultural Land Management v2.2 - Verra / FAO Climate and Agriculture News
item.itunes:author: YCP Holdings
item.itunes:summary:
2030年森林破壊ゼロへの絶対期限
情報源: Chestnut Carbon Issues First U.S. IFM Carbon Credits with Verras Removals Tag / Climate Action - European Commission / Corporate climate target-setting up 40% in 2025 - SBTi / Farmers are key to fighting climate change - WEF / Finite Carbon Announces Landmark Issuance - ACR IFM v2.1 / Land Sector and Removals Standard - GHG Protocol / SBTi FLAG Guidance Updated / VM0042 Improved Agricultural Land Management v2.2 - Verra / FAO Climate and Agriculture News
